executable_code.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv('input_file_0.csv')

df['capacity_mw'] = pd.to_numeric(df['capacity_mw'], errors='coerce')
df['commissioning_year'] = pd.to_numeric(df['commissioning_year'], errors='coerce')

# Filter for plants from 2010 onwards
df_filtered = df[df['commissioning_year'] >= 2010]

# Group by fuel type and calculate mean capacity
fuel_stats = df_filtered.groupby('std_fuel')['capacity_mw'].mean().reset_index()

# Filter for average capacity > 100 MW
result = fuel_stats[fuel_stats['capacity_mw'] > 100]

# Round to 2 decimal places
result['capacity_mw'] = result['capacity_mw'].round(2)

print(json.dumps(result.values.tolist(), ensure_ascii=False))
